topPlaces.name: Trilok Teerth Dham

topPlaces.name: Bada Gaon
topPlaces.description: Rawan Urf Bada Gaon is a village near Khekra, a town in the district of Bagpat, Uttar Pradesh. It is famous for Maa Mansa Devi Temple, This Temple was established by Ravana.

topPlaces.name: Supercomputing Facility for Bioinformatics and Computational Biology
topPlaces.description: Supercomputing Facility for Bioinformatics and Computational Biology, also known as SCFBio IIT Delhi, is a center for Bioinformatics & Computational Biology in Indian Institute of Technology, Delhi. This facility was established in 2002 under the aegis of the Department of Chemistry, IIT Delhi.

image.alt: Supercomputing Facility for Bioinformatics and Computational Biology

topPlaces.name: Nangla Badi
topPlaces.description: Nangla Badi is a village located in the Khekra tehsil, Baghpat district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is a rapidly developing village near Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Rataul
topPlaces.description: Rataul is a town and a nagar panchayat located in the Khekra tehsil, in the Baghpat district, Uttar Pradesh state, India. It is 25 km (16 mi) from the Indian capital of Delhi, and also 7 km (4.3 mi) from Loni.

topPlaces.name: Chamrawal
topPlaces.description: Chamrawal is a village in Bagpat district, Uttar Pradesh, India. Chamrawal is located at a distance of 6.556 km from Pilana town, and 16.25 km from Baghpat town.

topPlaces.name: Bandpur
topPlaces.description: Bandpur is a village located in the Khekra tehsil of Indian Bagpat district. It is located about 3.5 km from the New Delhi-Saharanpur highway.

topPlaces.name: Katha, Bagpat
topPlaces.description: Katha is a village in the Bagpat district of Uttar Pradesh, India. It is situated on the left bank of the Saharanpur Road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bada Gaon temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bada Gaon temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bada Gaon temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (42 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (28 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bada Gaon temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bada Gaon temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bada Gaon temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bada Gaon temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bada Gaon temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Trilok Teerth Dham, Bada Gaon, Supercomputing Facility for Bioinformatics and Computational Biology, Nangla Badi, Rataul.
